Foreground colour.description: Highlight text with a foreground colour

Foreground and background.description: Highlight text with foreground and background colours

Border.description: Highlight text with a coloured border

Block highlight.description: Wrap a block in foreground/background colour

Block with gradient.description: Wrap a block in a CSS gradient fill (HTML only)
